conditioning_diagnostic.interpretation: The exact certificate proves finiteness, but the AU.2 global derivative envelope loses many orders of magnitude. Directed finite-frequency quadrature is required before using these constants to decide a physical parameter window.

exact_outputs.claim_boundary: The finite-band proof discards profile-specific oscillatory cancellation and is not a sharp interval evaluation of the certified profile. It certifies finite ULE inputs, but not a useful coupling window, the exact reduced dynamics, switching from one action, band projection, stress, lifetime, or backreaction.
exact_outputs.goal: Validated Skyrmion AU.3 Global Sobolev Certificate
exact_outputs.proof_scope: Authenticated positivity of the exact normalized inertia measure and exact endpoint geometry give uniform kernel bounds on every rational finite-frequency cell. Exact upper sums bound that band, and the AU.2 p^-5 envelope recomputed at the same join bounds the complement. The joined values rigorously upper-bound global Q0,Q1,Q2 and the Sobolev G,M1 constants.
